ham.subject: Delivery Confirmation: Order #A12345 Delivered
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

This is to confirm that your parcel with tracking number A12345 was successfully delivered to the designated delivery point on 04/04/2026 at 10:45 AM. The recipient signature was obtained from John Doe.

You can view the full delivery details on our website here: <URL>

If you have any questions or believe this delivery is in error, please contact our customer support at 1-800-555-0199.

Thank you for choosing QuickShip.

Best regards,
QuickShip Delivery Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Customs Holds Your Shipment – Pay Now to Avoid Loss
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Our records indicate that your shipment (Reference #987654321) is currently detained by U.S. Customs at the border due to incomplete documentation. If the required customs duty is not paid within the next 24 hours, the shipment will be forfeited and you will be permanently barred from using our shipping services for 3 months.

Please submit the payment immediately by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Use the following bank details for the transfer:
Account Number: 1234 5678 9012 3456
IBAN: GB12YOLO987654321

Failure to comply will lead to the loss of your shipment and a 3‑month ban on future services.

Sincerely,
United States Customs Service
